front:
SKILL 1 вҖ” WASHING HANDS
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: None
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Arms angled DOWNWARD вҖ” hands LOWER than elbows when wetting & rinsing
вӯҗ Scrub 20+ seconds (palms, between fingers, backs, under nails)
вӯҗ Use 2nd paper towel to turn OFF faucet вҖ” clean hands never touch it
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Turn faucet ON with bare hand. Water running.
2. Arms DOWNWARD вҖ” hands LOWER than elbows. Wet hands AND wrists fully.
3. Apply soap. Form visible lather.
4. вӯҗ Scrub AT LEAST 20 SECONDS: palms together, between fingers, backs of hands, scratch nails on opposite palm.
5. Scratch nails of each hand on the opposite palm.
6. вӯҗ Rinse hands DOWNWARD (hands lower than elbows) вҖ” dirty water flows off fingertips, away from body.
7. вӯҗ Dry with paper towel (palms, backs, between fingers, wrists). Hold used towel вҖ” do NOT touch wastebasket yet.
8. Use a SECOND paper towel to grip faucet and turn water OFF.
9. Drop BOTH paper towels into wastebasket. Done.

front:
SKILL 2 вҖ” REMOVING (DOFFING) GLOVES
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: None
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Pinch OUTSIDE of palm of first glove вҖ” only touch dirty outer surface
вӯҗ Slide 2 bare fingers UNDER cuff of second glove вҖ” bare skin never touches outside
вӯҗ Peel second glove inside-out over first glove forming a pouch
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. вӯҗ Dominant hand pinches OUTSIDE palm of other glove. Pull it off вҖ” touching only dirty outer surface.
2. вӯҗ Hold removed glove in palm of still-gloved hand (make a fist around it). With bare hand, slide 2 fingers (index + middle) UNDER cuff of remaining glove at wrist.
3. вӯҗ Push fingers down and outward вҖ” peel glove INSIDE OUT off hand. It wraps around first glove like a pouch.
4. End result: one inside-out bundle, bare skin only touched clean inner surfaces.
5. Drop bundle into trash. Nothing touches sides of can.
6. Immediately wash hands.

front:
SKILL 3 вҖ” ABDOMINAL THRUST (HEIMLICH вҖ” CONSCIOUS)
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: None
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Fist: thumb-side against belly, ABOVE navel, BELOW breastbone
вӯҗ Wrap other hand around fist вҖ” pull INWARD and UP (J-shape motion)
вӯҗ Repeat until object pops out OR person loses consciousness
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Approach. Ask loudly: "ARE YOU CHOKING? CAN YOU BREATHE?"
2. If no verbal response вҖ” proceed immediately.
3. Move BEHIND person. Arms wrap under armpits around waist.
4. вӯҗ Make a FIST. Place flat thumb-side on belly: ABOVE navel, BELOW breastbone (center bullseye zone).
5. вӯҗ Other hand WRAPS AROUND fist. Pull TOWARD you and UP вҖ” sharp J-shape motion. Person should jolt.
6. Watch mouth. If nothing exits вҖ” RESET and repeat.
7. Continue until object exits OR person collapses (then call for help/CPR).
8. Sit person down. Report incident. Document.

front:
SKILL 4 вҖ” HANDLING SOILED EQUIPMENT
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Gloves
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Hold soiled equipment OUT AND AWAY from body вҖ” never touching clothes
вӯҗ Clean with COLD WATER first (hot can set biological material)
вӯҗ Wash hands BEFORE and AFTER the skill
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Wash and dry hands вҖ” full technique.
2. Don gloves вҖ” both hands snug at wrist.
3. вӯҗ Pick up soiled equipment (bedpan, urinal, etc.). Hold OUT AND AWAY from body вҖ” arms extended, not touching scrubs.
4. Carry to utility sink. Clean with COLD WATER first, then disinfectant. Scrub all surfaces.
5. Carry clean equipment to correct labeled storage. Place in designated spot.
6. Peel off gloves using doffing technique. Trash.
7. Wash and dry hands again вҖ” full technique.

front:
SKILL 5 вҖ” HANDLING SOILED WASTE
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Gloves, waste container, fresh bag liner
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Grab ONLY OUTSIDE surface of waste bag вҖ” never reach inside
вӯҗ Tie bag closed by twisting top and double-knotting (like a balloon)
вӯҗ Replace bag liner before leaving
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Wash hands вҖ” full technique.
2. Don gloves.
3. Drop soiled items one-by-one directly into waste container.
4. Disinfect any contaminated surfaces; let sit appropriate contact time before wiping.
5. Peel off gloves using doffing technique. Drop into waste container.
6. вӯҗ Grab ONLY OUTSIDE of waste bag. Pinch gathered top вҖ” tie CLOSED (twist + double-knot like a balloon).
7. Pull fresh liner from storage. Snap into empty container.
8. Wash and dry hands вҖ” full technique.
9. Carry tied bag to designated disposal area.

front:
SKILL 6 вҖ” HANDLING SOILED BED LINENS
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Gloves, linen bag
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ ROLL linen away from you вҖ” soiled surface folds INSIDE (like a sleeping bag)
вӯҗ Drop rolled bundle directly into linen bag вҖ” no floor contact
вӯҗ Grab ONLY EXTERIOR of linen bag to close and tie
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Wash hands вҖ” full technique.
2. Don gloves.
3. вӯҗ Grip edge of soiled linen and ROLL it вҖ” soiled surface INSIDE, rolling away from you. Keep away from clothing.
4. Carry rolled bundle and drop directly into linen bag. No floor contact.
5. Peel off gloves. Drop in waste container.
6. вӯҗ Grab ONLY EXTERIOR of linen bag. Close and TIE SHUT (pinch and knot). Replace liner inside bag holder.
7. Wash and dry hands вҖ” full technique.
8. Carry tied bag to laundry area.

front:
SKILL 7 вҖ” MOVING RESIDENT UP IN BED
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: None
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Staggered stance: feet 12 inches apart, front foot toward head of bed
вӯҗ One arm under SHOULDERS, one under HIPS
вӯҗ Shift weight from BACK to FRONT foot on "three" (leg momentum, not arm strength)
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands.
3. Face-to-face. Explain procedure slowly.
4. Privacy (curtain/door).
5. Lock wheels. Raise side rails. FLATTEN bed completely (head + knee sections). Work height appropriate.
6. Remove pillow. Fan-fold linens to foot of bed (resident covered for privacy).
7. Ask resident to BEND KNEES вҖ” feet flat on mattress, knees up.
8. вӯҗ Stand at SIDE of bed. Feet 12 INCHES APART in staggered stance вҖ” front foot pointing toward head of bed. Back straight. Bend at hips and knees (squat, not hunch).
9. вӯҗ Slide one arm under SHOULDERS, other arm under HIPS.
10. вӯҗ Count aloud "1, 2, 3" вҖ” tell resident to push feet into mattress and lift hips. On THREE: shift weight BACK FOOT to FRONT FOOT вҖ” use leg momentum to move resident up. No arm lifting.
11. Replace pillow. Check alignment вҖ” resident centered.
12. Lower bed to LOWEST position. Remove privacy. Side rails per order.
13. Call light within reach.
14. Wash hands.
15. Report changes to nurse. Document.

front:
SKILL 8 вҖ” MOVING RESIDENT UP IN BED вҖ” TWO-PERSON ASSIST
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Lift sheet, coworker
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ One person on EACH SIDE of bed, facing each other
вӯҗ Both grip rolled lift sheet: palms DOWN, one hand at SHOULDER, one at HIP level
вӯҗ Both count together and shift weight simultaneously on "three"
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain slowly.
3. Privacy.
4. вӯҗ CALL COWORKER вҖ” one person on each SIDE of bed, facing each other.
5. Lock wheels. Raise to comfortable working HEIGHT (waist level). Flatten head + knee sections.
6. Remove pillow. Fan-fold linens to foot (resident covered).
7. Confirm or place LIFT SHEET under resident's shoulders and hips.
8. Both of you roll long sides of lift sheet INWARD toward resident вҖ” snug against body.
9. вӯҗ Both reach across: grasp rolled edge with BOTH HANDS palms FACING DOWN. One hand at SHOULDER level, one at HIP level.
10. Ask resident to bend knees and feet flat if able.
11. вӯҗ Both in staggered stance (feet 12 inches apart, front toward head of bed). Back straight, bend at hips/knees.
12. Count aloud together: "1, 2, 3" вҖ” BOTH shift weight front simultaneously, LIFTING lift sheet. Resident glides up on sheet.
13. Replace pillow. Check alignment.
14. Lower bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order.
15. Call light within reach.
16. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 9 вҖ” TURNING RESIDENT вҖ” AWAY & TOWARDS YOU
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Pillows
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Turning AWAY: one hand under SHOULDER, one under HIP вҖ” roll like a log away from you
вӯҗ Turning TOWARD: place hands on FAR SHOULDER and FAR HIP вҖ” roll like a log toward you
вӯҗ Feet 12 inches apart, knees slightly bent throughout
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain slowly. Privacy.
3. Lock wheels. Raise BOTH side rails. Raise bed to working height. Lower head section FLAT.
4. Fan-fold linens to foot (keeping resident covered for privacy).
5. Stand at side. Feet 12 INCHES APART, knees SLIGHTLY BENT.

вҖ” TURNING AWAY FROM YOU вҖ”
1. Cross resident's nearest arm OVER CHEST. Cross nearest leg OVER far leg (foot rests on bed).
2. вӯҗ Slide one hand under NEAREST SHOULDER, other under NEAREST HIP. Back straight, bend at hips/knees. Roll resident AWAY вҖ” like rolling a log away from you.

вҖ” TURNING TOWARD YOU вҖ”
1. Go to FAR side of bed. Cross FAR ARM over CHEST. Move near arm out of the way. Cross FAR LEG over near leg.
2. вӯҗ Place one hand on FAR SHOULDER, other on FAR HIP. Back straight, bend at hips/knees. Roll resident TOWARD YOU вҖ” controlled log roll.

вҖ” ENDING STEPS вҖ”
1. Return resident to BACK (supine). Straighten clothing. Smooth linens. Check tubes.
2. Lower bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Remove privacy.
3. Call light within reach.
4. Wash hands. Report changes. Document.

front:
SKILL 10 вҖ” TURNING RESIDENT USING A TURN SHEET
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Pillows, turn sheet, coworker
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Move resident to OPPOSITE side first вҖ” gives room to roll into
вӯҗ Cross arms over chest + cross away-leg over near leg before rolling
вӯҗ Both grip rolled sheet at SHOULDER and HIP level вҖ” flip like a large fish with a net
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain slowly. Privacy.
3. Lock wheels. Raise BOTH side rails. Raise bed to working height. Flatten head section.
4. Fan-fold top linens. Place pillow at HEAD of bed.
5. вӯҗ Gently shift resident to OPPOSITE SIDE of bed from turning direction (creates room to roll).
6. вӯҗ Cross resident's arms over CHEST. Cross away-leg over near leg.
7. Roll edges of TURN SHEET inward on the side NOT being turned toward.
8. Both you and coworker grip rolled sheet вҖ” one at SHOULDER, one at HIP.
9. Alert resident and coworker: "Turning on three."
10. вӯҗ On THREE вҖ” both backs straight, bending at hips/knees вҖ” use sheet as lever to ROLL resident to their side. Controlled, smooth, one direction.
11. Pillow under HEAD AND NECK (ear to shoulder).
12. Check spine alignment from foot of bed вҖ” straight line? Comfortable?
13. Straighten clothing, linens, recheck tubes.
14. Lower bed to LOWEST. Adjust siderails. Call light within reach.
15. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 11 вҖ” LATERAL POSITION вҖ” TURNING RESIDENT TOWARDS YOU
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Pillows
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Move resident to FAR side of bed first вҖ” gives rolling space toward you
вӯҗ One hand on FAR SHOULDER, one on FAR HIP вҖ” roll toward you in one smooth motion
вӯҗ Pillow BEHIND back (prevents rolling backward) + pillow BETWEEN knees
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Lock wheels. Raise BOTH side rails. Raise bed. Flatten head section.
4. Fan-fold linens. Place pillow at HEAD of bed.
5. Stand at side you want resident to roll TOWARD. Feet 12 inches apart, knees slightly bent.
6. вӯҗ Move resident to FAR side of bed вҖ” away from you (gives room to roll toward you).
7. Cross FAR ARM over chest. Tuck near arm safely. Cross FAR LEG over near leg.
8. вӯҗ One hand on FAR SHOULDER, other on FAR HIP. Back straight. Bend at hips/knees. Roll resident SMOOTHLY TOWARD YOU in one controlled motion вҖ” on their side facing you.
9. вӯҗ Slide pillow BEHIND resident's BACK (fills gap, prevents backward roll). Place pillow BETWEEN KNEES. Prop upper arm if needed.
10. Pillow under HEAD AND NECK (ear to shoulder).
11. Check spine alignment вҖ” neutral straight line? Top hip relaxed? Comfortable?
12. Adjust clothing, linens, tubing.
13. Lower bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Remove privacy.
14. Call light within reach. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 12 вҖ” LATERAL POSITION вҖ” TURNING RESIDENT AWAY FROM YOU
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Pillows
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Move resident to NEAR side first вҖ” gives rolling space away from you
вӯҗ One hand under NEAR SHOULDER, one under NEAR HIP вҖ” roll away like a log
вӯҗ Pillow BEHIND back + pillow BETWEEN knees after positioning
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Lock wheels. Raise BOTH side rails. Raise bed. Flatten head section.
4. Fan-fold linens. Place pillow at HEAD of bed.
5. Stand at side. Feet 12 inches apart, knees slightly bent.
6. вӯҗ Move resident to NEAR side of bed вҖ” closest to you (gives room to roll away).
7. Cross NEAREST ARM over chest. Cross NEAREST LEG over far leg.
8. вӯҗ One hand UNDER NEAREST SHOULDER, other UNDER NEAREST HIP. Back straight, bend at hips/knees. Roll resident AWAY from you вҖ” smooth log roll to far side.
9. вӯҗ Pillow BEHIND resident's BACK. Pillow BETWEEN KNEES. Support upper arm if needed.
10. Adjust pillow under HEAD AND NECK.
11. Check spine alignment вҖ” neutral? Top hip relaxed? Comfortable?
12. Adjust clothing, linens, tubing.
13. Lower bed. Side rails per order. Remove privacy.
14. Call light. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 13 вҖ” PASSIVE RANGE OF MOTION (PROM)
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: None
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Support limb on BOTH SIDES of the joint being moved at all times
вӯҗ Move GENTLY, SLOWLY, SMOOTHLY вҖ” stop at FIRST RESISTANCE or ANY sign of pain
вӯҗ Each movement performed AT LEAST 3 TIMES
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain each movement BEFORE doing it.
3. Privacy. Lock wheels. Raise side rails. Adjust to working height.
4. Resident lies FLAT SUPINE вҖ” head/spine/hips/legs aligned.
5. вӯҗ Before every movement: support limb on BOTH SIDES of joint. Move GENTLY, SLOWLY, SMOOTHLY. Stop at RESISTANCE or any pain. Perform each move вүҘ3 TIMES.

SHOULDER (support elbow + wrist):
вҖў Flexion: raise arm forward and up to 90В°
вҖў Extension: lower back to side
вҖў Abduction: sweep arm out sideways to 90В°
вҖў Adduction: bring arm back to center

ELBOW (support wrist + elbow):
вҖў Flexion: bend elbow вҖ” forearm to shoulder
вҖў Extension: straighten back out flat
вҖў Pronation: rotate palm DOWN
вҖў Supination: rotate palm UP

WRIST (hold wrist steady, guide hand):
вҖў Flexion: push fingers DOWNWARD
вҖў Dorsiflexion: push fingers BACK toward forearm
вҖў Radial: tilt toward thumb side
вҖў Ulnar: tilt toward pinky side

THUMB: Abduction/Adduction/Opposition (touch each fingertip)/Flexion/Extension

FINGERS: Flexion (fist)/Extension (open)/Abduction (spread)/Adduction (close)

HIP (support knee + ankle):
вҖў Abduction: slide leg OUT sideways
вҖў Adduction: slide back across center
вҖў Internal rotation: roll leg inward (toes toward other leg)
вҖў External rotation: roll leg outward

KNEES (support under knee + ankle):
вҖў Flexion: bend knee вҖ” heel toward buttocks
вҖў Extension: straighten leg flat

ANKLES (cup heel + top of foot):
вҖў Dorsiflexion: push top of foot UP toward shin ("toes to nose")
вҖў Plantar flexion: push sole DOWN (ballet toe)
вҖў Supination: sole rotates inward
вҖў Pronation: sole rotates outward

TOES: Flexion/Extension/Abduction/Adduction

Ending:
вҖў Comfortable position. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order.
вҖў Call light. Wash hands.
вҖў вӯҗ Report any DECREASED range of motion or PAIN. Document noting stiffness/pain.

front:
SKILL 14 вҖ” TRANSFERRING RESIDENT WITH MECHANICAL LIFT
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Mechanical lift, sling, robe/slippers if used, chair/wheelchair
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Lock WHEELCHAIR brakes вҖ” both sides click firmly before positioning
вӯҗ Sling edge at BACK, bottom at BACK OF KNEES вҖ” spread fully like a hammock
вӯҗ Raise ONLY 2 inches above mattress вҖ” pause before moving; LEAVE SLING IN CHAIR after transfer
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain slowly.
3. Privacy. Scan area вҖ” clear path, no furniture in way.
4. Lock all bed wheels. Raise BOTH side rails.
5. вӯҗ Roll WHEELCHAIR to bedside. Press BOTH BRAKE LEVERS DOWN вҖ” wheels must not spin.
6. вӯҗ Help resident turn toward you. Go to FAR side. Slide SLING under resident вҖ” edge at BACK, bottom at BACK OF KNEES. Roll resident back. Spread sling fully вҖ” hammock shape under them.
7. Roll lift to bedside. Widen base to WIDEST "V" position. Push base UNDER bed. Overhead bar directly above resident's torso.
8. вӯҗ Attach sling loops/straps to overhead bar вҖ” one set per side. Check ALL connections. Fold resident's arms over chest.
9. Pump/electric control to RAISE resident. Stop 2 INCHES above mattress. PAUSE вҖ” let resident gain balance. Speak calmly.
10. Coworker stands on other side вҖ” guides and supports as lift rolls. Move until resident is DIRECTLY OVER wheelchair seat.
11. Slowly LOWER into chair. Coworker pushes DOWN on KNEES to guide proper seated position.
12. Unhook straps. LEAVE SLING IN PLACE вҖ” do not remove.
13. Hips fully back in chair seat. Remove privacy. Side rails per order.
14. Call light. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 15 вҖ” ASSISTING RESIDENT TO AMBULATE
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Nonskid shoes, gait belt
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Gait belt over CLOTHING, snug вҖ” flat hand fits under, but NOT a fist
вӯҗ Stand on WEAKER SIDE, slightly behind вҖ” hand on BACK of gait belt at all times
вӯҗ Sit resident at edge of bed 1-2 minutes before standing вҖ” watch for dizziness
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain slowly.
3. Privacy. Lower bed to LOWEST. Lock wheels. Raise head. Help resident sit at edge вҖ” BOTH FEET FLAT on floor. PAUSE 1-2 minutes вҖ” watch for dizziness.
4. Apply NONSKID SHOES вҖ” both feet. Fasten completely.
5. Stand DIRECTLY IN FRONT. Feet shoulder-width apart.
6. вӯҗ Wrap GAIT BELT around waist OVER clothing. Snug вҖ” flat hand fits, not fist. No pinched skin. Grasp BOTH SIDES with underhand grip (thumbs up).
7. Block resident's knees with your knees if needed. Bend your knees. Back straight.
8. Tell resident: "Lean forward, push hands into mattress. Stand on three." 1-2-3 вҖ” belt UP, shift weight, resident pushes. Rise TOGETHER.
9. вӯҗ Pivot to stand BESIDE resident вҖ” NOT in front. Walk SLIGHTLY BEHIND and to the SIDE. Hand on BACK of gait belt at all times. Stand on WEAKER SIDE.
10. Watch feet, posture, breathing. "Eyes forward, not down."
11. Walk full ordered distance. Guide back. Lower safely. Remove belt. Check alignment.
12. Bed to lowest. Call light. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 16 вҖ” ASSISTING TO AMBULATE вҖ” CANE
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Gait belt, nonskid shoes, cane
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Cane in STRONGER/UNAFFECTED hand
вӯҗ Stand on WEAK SIDE, slightly behind вҖ” hand on BACK of gait belt
вӯҗ Pattern: CANE FORWARD вҶ’ WEAK STEP вҶ’ STRONG STEP (repeat)
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Lower bed to LOWEST. Lock wheels. Help sit at edge вҖ” feet flat.
4. Apply NONSKID SHOES. Fasten.
5. Stand directly in front. Gait belt over clothing, snug, underhand grip.
6. Help to standing (block knees if needed, count "1-2-3").
7. вӯҗ Place CANE in resident's STRONGER/UNAFFECTED HAND. Handle facing up.
8. вӯҗ Move to WEAK SIDE вҖ” slightly BEHIND. Grasp BACK of gait belt.
9. вӯҗ Instruct cane walking pattern:
   вҖў CANE FORWARD ~6 inches (tripod plant ahead)
   вҖў WEAK LEG steps EVEN WITH cane tip
   вҖў STRONG LEG steps PAST cane
   вҖў REPEAT: CANE вҶ’ WEAK вҶ’ STRONG
10. Walk on weak side. Eyes forward. Call out obstacles.
11. Encourage rest if tired. Resident sets pace.
12. Return to bed/chair. Lower safely. Remove belt. Check alignment.
13. Bed to lowest. Call light. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 17 вҖ” ASSISTING TO AMBULATE вҖ” WALKER
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Gait belt, nonskid shoes, walker
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Walker placed DIRECTLY IN FRONT вҖ” resident grasps both handles
вӯҗ Stand on WEAK SIDE, slightly behind вҖ” hand on BACK of gait belt
вӯҗ Pattern: WALKER FORWARD вҶ’ WEAK STEP вҶ’ STRONG STEP (ALL 4 feet on floor before stepping)
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Lower bed to LOWEST. Lock wheels. Help sit at edge вҖ” feet flat.
4. Apply NONSKID SHOES. Fasten.
5. Stand directly in front. Gait belt over clothing, snug, underhand grip.
6. Help to standing (block knees if needed, count "1-2-3").
7. вӯҗ Place WALKER directly IN FRONT of resident вҖ” grasp BOTH HANDLES.
8. вӯҗ Move to WEAK SIDE вҖ” slightly BEHIND. Grasp BACK of gait belt.
9. вӯҗ Instruct walker walking pattern:
   вҖў LIFT/ROLL walker FORWARD ~6 inches
   вҖў ALL FOUR FEET firmly on floor before stepping (no rocking/tipping)
   вҖў WEAK LEG steps FORWARD into walker space
   вҖў STRONG LEG steps EVEN WITH or past weak leg
   вҖў REPEAT: WALKER FORWARD вҶ’ WEAK вҶ’ STRONG
10. Walk on weak side. Eyes forward. Watch for obstacles.
11. Encourage rest if tired. Resident sets pace.
12. Return. Lower safely. Remove belt. Check alignment.
13. Bed to lowest. Call light. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 18 вҖ” TRANSFERRING BED TO CHAIR/WHEELCHAIR
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Chair/wheelchair, gait belt, nonskid footwear, robe or blanket
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Wheelchair on STRONG SIDE at foot of bed, diagonal to bed, ARM nearly touching вҖ” BOTH brakes locked
вӯҗ Gait belt snug over clothing вҖ” flat hand fits under, block knees on "three"
вӯҗ Guide until BACKS OF LEGS touch wheelchair seat edge before lowering
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy. Clear path.
3. Lock bed wheels. Raise head of bed fully вҖ” resident sitting upright. Lower bed to LOWEST вҖ” feet flat.
4. Help swing legs to edge вҖ” sit upright. BOTH FEET FLAT on floor. PAUSE 1-2 min вҖ” watch for dizziness.
5. вӯҗ Position wheelchair at FOOT of bed, angled diagonally facing head of bed, on resident's STRONG SIDE. Arm nearly touching bed side. Press BOTH BRAKE LEVERS вҖ” wheels locked.
6. Flip up or remove footrest on side nearest bed.
7. вӯҗ CONFIRM both wheelchair wheels locked вҖ” try pushing.
8. Apply NONSKID SHOES вҖ” both feet. Fasten.
9. Stand DIRECTLY IN FRONT. Feet shoulder-width.
10. вӯҗ Wrap GAIT BELT over clothing. Snug вҖ” flat hand fits. Check no pinched skin. Underhand grip, thumbs up.
11. Tell resident: "Push off bed with hands and lean forward." Press your knees against theirs. Back straight, bend at hips/knees. "1-2-3" вҖ” gait belt UP, resident pushes вҖ” RISE TOGETHER.
12. Guide small shuffling steps вҖ” resident rotates back toward wheelchair until BACKS OF LEGS touch seat front edge.
13. Resident grasps BOTH ARMRESTS. Slowly LOWER into chair вҖ” bend your knees, gait belt guides descent.
14. Slide hips fully AGAINST SEAT BACK. Flip footrests. Place feet on rests. Check alignment. Remove belt.
15. Remove privacy. Call light. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 19 вҖ” TRANSFERRING WHEELCHAIR TO TOILET
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Toilet, gait belt, gloves
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ STRONG SIDE nearest toilet вҖ” resident pivots on strong side
вӯҗ Block resident's knees with yours вҖ” feet outside theirs вҖ” prevent buckling
вӯҗ Pivot on STRONG SIDE until backs of legs touch toilet edge, then lower
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy вҖ” close bathroom door.
3. вӯҗ Roll wheelchair next to toilet вҖ” STRONG SIDE nearest toilet (pivot on that side). Lock wheelchair. Swing/remove footrests. BOTH FEET FLAT on floor.
4. Gait belt around waist over clothing. Snug. Adjust clothing for toileting.
5. вӯҗ Stand FACING resident. Feet 12 inches apart, placed OUTSIDE and alongside resident's feet. Bend knees вҖ” your knees/shins against FRONT of resident's knees (blocking buckling). Grasp gait belt underhand, thumbs up. Back straight.
6. "1-2-3" вҖ” resident leans forward, pushes off armrests. You pull belt UPWARD and slightly toward you. Rise to standing.
7. вӯҗ PIVOT on STRONG SIDE toward toilet вҖ” small shuffling steps. Guide until BACKS OF LEGS touch FRONT EDGE of toilet. Centered in front of bowl.
8. Resident grasps GRAB BARS on both sides. Adjust clothing. Slowly LOWER onto seat вҖ” bend YOUR knees, gait belt guides descent.
9. Call light within arm's reach. CLOSE bathroom door.
10. Stay NEARBY. Re-enter when signaled.
11. Gloves on. While standing: perineal care вҖ” FRONT TO BACK. Pat dry.
12. Remove gloves. Adjust clothing.
13. REVERSE procedure вҖ” gait belt, "1-2-3", pivot on strong side, lower into wheelchair.
14. Remove privacy. Call light. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 20 вҖ” MEASURING HEIGHT AND WEIGHT (AMBULATORY)
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Scale
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Balance bar must FLOAT LEVEL at zero before resident steps on
вӯҗ Read weight: large slider first (dip then back 1 notch), then small slider until bar floats вҖ” must be within 1 LB
вӯҗ Read height at horizontal arm вҖ” must be accurate within Вј INCH; help resident step off BEFORE recording
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Check resident's nonskid shoes вҖ” on and fastened. Walk to scale.
4. вӯҗ Check balance bar вҖ” must FLOAT LEVEL. If off, slide BOTH indicators to ZERO вҖ” bar should level.
5. Help resident step ONTO scale platform, facing AWAY from readout.
6. вӯҗ Move LARGE slider right (in increments) until bar dips DOWN, then back ONE notch. Move SMALL slider right (small increments) until bar FLOATS LEVEL вҖ” hovering in middle. READ both numbers and ADD TOGETHER = weight. Must be within 1 LB.
7. Resident stands STRAIGHT AND TALL вҖ” chin level, eyes forward.
8. Pull UP measuring rod from back of scale. Slowly LOWER horizontal arm until it rests FLAT on TOP of head.
9. вӯҗ Read measurement where arm meets rod. Must be within Вј INCH.
10. вӯҗ BEFORE recording: help resident STEP OFF SCALE SAFELY. Hold arm. Rod doesn't swing down on them.
11. Wash hands. Call light. WRITE DOWN height AND weight.
12. Report changes to nurse.

front:
SKILL 21 вҖ” TUB BATH
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Towels, bath blanket, washcloths, soap, shampoo, lotion, clean clothing, gloves, tub chair, bath thermometer, safety straps
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Fill tub HALF FULL, 104-105В°F вҖ” resident tests temperature themselves
вӯҗ Safety straps ALL fastened on tub chair вҖ” tug each to confirm secure
вӯҗ Clean CLEANEST TO DIRTIEST: Eyes вҶ’ Face/Neck/Ears вҶ’ Arms/Armpits вҶ’ Chest/Abdomen вҶ’ Legs/Feet вҶ’ Back/Buttocks вҶ’ Perineal Care
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Prepare tub room FIRST вҖ” clean tub, dry floor, air temperature OK.
4. Offer toilet. Assist if needed.
5. Walk/wheel resident and supplies to tub room.
6. вӯҗ Fill tub HALF FULL with WARM water. Thermometer: 104вҖ“105В°F. Guide resident's hand to water вҖ” THEY test it. Add cleanser if used. Gloves on.
7. Help undress. Drape TOWEL over groin and TOWEL over shoulders (covered and warm).
8. вӯҗ Help resident into TUB CHAIR. FASTEN ALL SAFETY STRAPS вҖ” click or velcro each. TUG each to confirm secure.
9. Use lift mechanism per facility вҖ” lower chair into tub. Stay right next to resident.
10. Allow self-washing where able. Keep privacy towels. STAY IN ROOM.
11. Wash face first вҖ” eyes, face, neck.
12. Whirlpool 5 min if present and desired.
13. Shampoo hair if needed.
14. вӯҗ Washcloth MITT. Wash CLEANEST to DIRTIEST order:
    EYES (no soap, innerвҶ’outer, fresh section per eye) вҶ’ FACE/NECK/EARS вҶ’ ARMS/ARMPITS (shoulderвҶ’wrist) вҶ’ CHEST/ABDOMEN вҶ’ LEGS/FEET (between toes) вҶ’ BACK/BUTTOCKS вҶ’ PERINEAL CARE (change gloves)
15. Drain. Raise chair out of tub per facility procedure.
16. Drape towels/bath blanket вҖ” resident fully covered. Remove gloves.
17. Pat DRY every surface вҖ” folds, between toes, under breasts, armpits.
18. Apply deodorant, lotion, powder per preference. Back massage if in care plan.
19. Help into clean clothing. Return resident and supplies to room.
20. Call light. Wash hands. Report. Document.
21. Return to tub room. Gloves. Linens in hamper. Disinfect ALL tub and chair surfaces completely.

front:
SKILL 22 вҖ” SHOWER
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Towels, washcloths, soap, shampoo, clean clothing, gloves, shower chair if needed, bath thermometer
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Temperature 105В°F вҖ” resident tests spray before positioned under it
вӯҗ Monitor temperature THROUGHOUT shower
вӯҗ Clean CLEANEST TO DIRTIEST (same order as tub bath)
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Prepare shower room FIRST вҖ” clean floor/walls, air temp, chair if needed.
4. Offer toilet. Assist if needed.
5. Walk/wheel resident and supplies. Help undress.
6. вӯҗ Turn ON water. Thermometer under stream вҖ” stabilize at 105В°F. Hold resident's hand near spray вҖ” THEY test before positioning under it. Monitor temp throughout.
7. Position resident. Cover genitalia with towel. Rinse body down completely. Gloves on.
8. Let resident self-wash where able. Soap/washcloth within reach. STAY in room.
9. Help wash face. Shampoo hair if needed.
10. вӯҗ Washcloth MITT. Wash CLEANEST to DIRTIEST:
    EYES (no soap, innerвҶ’outer, fresh section per eye) вҶ’ FACE/NECK/EARS вҶ’ ARMS/ARMPITS вҶ’ CHEST/ABDOMEN вҶ’ LEGS/FEET (between toes) вҶ’ BACK/BUTTOCKS вҶ’ PERINEAL CARE
11. Turn OFF water. Immediately wrap with towels. Remove gloves.
12. Pat ALL surfaces dry вҖ” folds, between toes, armpits, under breasts.
13. Back massage if indicated. Help dress. Remove gloves.
14. Return resident and supplies to room.
15. Call light. Wash hands. Report. Document.
16. Return to shower room. Gloves on. Linens in hamper. Disinfect shower and chair completely.

front:
SKILL 23 вҖ” PARTIAL BATH
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Washbasin, towels, washcloths, soap, clean clothing, gloves, bath thermometer
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Basin 2/3 full, вүӨ105В°F вҖ” resident tests with hand
вӯҗ Uncover ONLY body part being washed; towel UNDER it
вӯҗ Partial bath covers: FACE, ARMPITS, HANDS, and PERI CARE
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. вӯҗ Fill WASHBASIN 2/3 FULL. Thermometer вҖ” вүӨ105В°F. Carry to overbed table. Guide resident's fingers to water вҖ” THEY test. Adjust if needed.
4. Lock wheels. Adjust bed. Gloves on.
5. вӯҗ Fold back linens ONLY to uncover body part being washed. Place TOWEL UNDER that part as a mat.
6. Wash, rinse, dry one part at a time. Partial bath = FACE, ARMPITS, HANDS, PERI CARE.
7. вӯҗ EYES: no soap, fresh cloth section, innerвҶ’outer corner, one stroke per eye. Rinse, pat dry.
8. FACE: center outward strokes вҖ” forehead, cheeks, nose, mouth last. Ears and neck. Rinse. Pat dry.
9. ARMPITS and HANDS (far arm first). Rinse. Pat dry.
10. DUMP and REFILL basin after armpits вҖ” same temp check.
11. Reapply gloves. PERI CARE per procedure.
12. Remove gloves. Wash hands.
13. Help into clean gown. Grooming. Remove bath blanket, restore bedding.
14. Soiled items in proper containers.
15. Change gloves. Wash hands. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Remove privacy.
16. Call light. Empty/rinse/dry basin. Return to storage. Discard gloves. Wash hands. Report. Document. Note skin changes.

front:
SKILL 24 вҖ” COMPLETE BED BATH
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Washbasin, bath blanket, towels, washcloths, soap, clean clothing, gloves, bath thermometer, lotion, orangewood stick
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Basin вүӨ105В°F вҖ” wrist test + resident tests; change water when cool/soapy/dirty
вӯҗ Bath blanket covers resident ENTIRELY вҖ” expose and re-cover ONE body part at a time
вӯҗ Order: HEAD DOWN, front first вҖ” Eyes/Face/Neck вҶ’ Arms/Hands вҶ’ Chest вҶ’ Abdomen вҶ’ Legs/Feet вҶ’ Back вҶ’ Perineal
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy. Warm room, no drafts.
3. вӯҗ Fill basin 2/3 FULL. Thermometer вҖ” вүӨ105В°F. Wrist test + RESIDENT tests. Change water when cool/soapy/dirty.
4. Lock wheels. Raise side rails. Adjust bed. Gloves on.
5. вӯҗ Drape BATH BLANKET over entire resident. Resident holds it. Pull top linens OUT from under вҖ” fan-fold to foot. Remove clothing under blanket. Bath blanket = only covering.
6. Uncover ONE body part at a time. Towel under each part. Re-cover before moving on.
7. Wash HEAD DOWN, front first. Use FRESH cloth section every stroke.

EYES/FACE/EARS/NECK: No soap for eyes; innerвҶ’outer per eye. Face: center outward. Rinse, dry.
ARMS/ARMPITS: Far arm first, shoulderвҶ’wrist, wash armpit. Rinse, dry, re-cover. Repeat near arm.
HANDS: Far hand вҖ” soap palm/back/each finger. Orangewood stick under nails. Rinse, dry (fully between fingers). Lotion on elbow + hand. Repeat near hand.
CHEST: Towel horizontally over chest. Blanket to waist. Wash under towel вҖ” including under breasts (check folds for irritation). Rinse, dry.
ABDOMEN: Towel over chest. Blanket just above pubic area. Wash abdomen. Rinse, dry. Cover, remove towel.
LEGS/FEET: Far leg only вҖ” blanket away. Towel lengthwise. ThighвҶ’kneeвҶ’ankleвҶ’foot. Between toes completely dry. Lotion on heels (NOT between toes). Re-cover. Near leg.
BACK: Roll resident toward far rail. Blanket away from back. Towel along spine. Long downward strokes neckвҶ’buttocks. Rinse, dry, lotion if ordered.
PERINEAL: Towel under buttocks. Roll to back. If resident CAN self-care вҖ” set up basin/cloth/towel, call light, privacy. If CANNOT вҖ” change gloves, fresh basin, perform peri care (Skills 25/26).

8. Change gloves and wash hands.
9. Deodorant. Fresh towel over pillow. Comb hair. Clean clothing. Comfortable alignment.
10. вӯҗ Remove bath blanket, replace with regular blanket in one smooth motion.
11. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Remove privacy.
12. Call light. Empty/rinse/dry basin. Remove gloves. Wash hands. Report. Document skin issues.

front:
SKILL 25 вҖ” MALE PERINEAL CARE
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Gloves, washbasin, washcloths, towels, bath blanket, bed protector, plastic bag
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

вӯҗ Front-to-back for perineum/anal area вҖ” one stroke per section, used cloth goes into bag (NEVER back in basin)
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy. Warm room.
3. вӯҗ Fill basin 2/3 FULL. вүӨ105В°F. Wrist test + resident tests.
4. Lock wheels. Raise side rails. Adjust bed. Gloves on.
5. вӯҗ Bath blanket over resident. Pull regular linens out from under. Fold blanket UP from bottom вҖ” expose GENITALIA ONLY. Resident bends KNEES, feet flat on mattress.

10. Hold shaft gently steady.

14. Fresh section вҖ” wash SCROTUM (all folds) and GROIN (inner thigh areas). Rinse. Pat dry.
15. Cover with bath blanket. Roll resident to side вҖ” back facing you.
16. If feces: toilet tissue to remove. Drop in bag. Change gloves + wash hands.
17. вӯҗ PERINEUM first, then ANAL area вҖ” FRONT TO BACK, one stroke per section.
18. RINSE front to back. Into bag. Pat dry.
19. Peri cream if ordered (change gloves first; nurse applies if for skin breakdown).
20. Apply incontinent brief if used. Remove bed protector.
21. Change gloves + wash hands. Comfortable position. Adjust clothing/linens.
22. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Remove privacy.
23. Call light. Empty/rinse/dry basin. Remove gloves. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 26 вҖ” FEMALE PERINEAL CARE
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Gloves, washbasin, washcloths, towels, bath blanket, bed protector, plastic bag
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy. Warm room.

front:
SKILL 27 вҖ” PROVIDING CATHETER CARE
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Gloves, washbasin, washcloths, towels, bed protector
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Hold catheter NEAR meatus вҖ” keep it still, do NOT pull or tug

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. вӯҗ Fill basin with warm water. Wrist test вҖ” вүӨ105В°F. Resident check.
