6. Gloves on. Resident bends knees, pushes up hips вҖ” slide BED PROTECTOR under buttocks.
7. Fold bath blanket just enough to access catheter. Towel/pad UNDER catheter tubing (clean working surface).
8. Dip cloth, apply SOAP. Find MEATUS (opening where catheter enters body).
9. Wash skin AROUND meatus with small strokes, new section per stroke.
10. вӯҗ One hand HOLDS catheter near meatus вҖ” STEADY, firm but not bending. Do NOT pull or tug.
11. вӯҗ Other hand cleans AT LEAST 4 INCHES of catheter вҖ” starting AT meatus, stroke OUTWARD/AWAY in one direction only. New cloth section per stroke. NEVER stroke back toward meatus.
12. RINSE skin around meatus with clean cloth. Pat dry.
13. вӯҗ RINSE AT LEAST 4 INCHES of catheter вҖ” starting at meatus, moving away. New section per stroke.
14. вӯҗ DRY AT LEAST 4 INCHES of catheter вҖ” starting at meatus, moving away. No tugging.
15. Remove towel/pad. Change gloves + wash hands. Replace top sheet, remove bath blanket.
16. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Remove privacy.
17. Call light. Carry basin to bathroom вҖ” empty, clean, store.
18. Remove gloves. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 28 вҖ” EMPTYING URINARY DRAINAGE BAG
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Graduate, alcohol wipes, paper towels, gloves
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Drain spout tip must NOT touch sides of graduate while emptying
вӯҗ After draining: wipe drain spout with ALCOHOL WIPE (all surfaces), then slide back into holder
вӯҗ Read graduate with EYES LEVEL to measurement line вҖ” note color, clarity, odor
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain briefly.
3. Privacy. Gloves on.
4. Lay PAPER TOWEL flat on floor beneath drainage bag. Set GRADUATE on it directly under drain spout.
5. вӯҗ Find drain spout at bottom of bag. Open CLAMP вҖ” urine flows DOWN into graduate. Tip of spout must NOT touch sides of graduate вҖ” hover above opening.
6. вӯҗ When bag is empty and flow stops: CLOSE CLAMP. Open ALCOHOL WIPE вҖ” wipe DRAIN SPOUT thoroughly (tip, sides, every surface). Slide spout back into its sleeve/holder on bag.
7. вӯҗ Carry graduate LEVEL to bathroom. Set on flat surface. CROUCH вҖ” eyes at MEASUREMENT LINE. Read at BOTTOM of liquid curve (meniscus). Note: COLOR, CLARITY, ODOR.
8. Empty graduate into toilet. Flush. Rinse graduate with clean water. Dry. Return to storage. Discard paper towels.
9. Remove gloves. Wash hands.
10. Write AMOUNT and CHARACTERISTICS (color, clarity, odor).

front:
SKILL 29 вҖ” MEASURING AND RECORDING URINARY/FLUID OUTPUT
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Graduate, gloves
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Crouch so eyes are LEVEL with measurement marks вҖ” read at bottom curve (meniscus)
вӯҗ Must be accurate within 25 mL
вӯҗ Wash hands BEFORE walking to documentation area
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Wash hands.
2. вӯҗ Gloves ON before touching bedpan or urinal.
3. Carry to bathroom. POUR contents carefully into graduate вҖ” tip gently, avoid splashing.
4. вӯҗ Set graduate on FLAT SURFACE. CROUCH вҖ” eyes LEVEL with measurement markings. Read at BOTTOM of liquid curve (meniscus). Write down amount. Convert to mL if in oz. Must be within 25 mL accuracy.
5. Empty graduate into toilet. No splashing.
6. RINSE graduate with clean water. Pour rinse into toilet.
7. RINSE bedpan or urinal. Pour rinse into toilet. FLUSH.
8. Place graduate and bedpan/urinal in proper cleaning area or wash and return.
9. Remove gloves.
10. вӯҗ Wash hands BEFORE walking to documentation area.
11. On I&O sheet вҖ” write TIME and AMOUNT in OUTPUT column.
12. Report changes to nurse.

front:
SKILL 30 вҖ” MEASURING & RECORDING BLOOD PRESSURE (ONE-STEP)
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Sphygmomanometer, stethoscope, alcohol wipes
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Arrow/center marker over BRACHIAL ARTERY, bottom edge 1вҖ“1ВҪ inches ABOVE inner elbow bend
вӯҗ First distinct TAPPING SOUND = SYSTOLIC (top number)
вӯҗ Sound DISAPPEARS = DIASTOLIC (bottom number); must be accurate within 4 BPM
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Wipe stethoscope EARPIECES and DIAPHRAGM with alcohol wipe.
4. Roll sleeve вҖ” entire upper arm bare, no clothing bunched under cuff.
5. Arm resting PALM UP at heart level.
6. Deflate cuff completely вҖ” open valve (counterclockwise), squeeze all air out.
7. вӯҗ Wrap cuff around UPPER ARM вҖ” center marker/arrow over BRACHIAL ARTERY (inner arm, thumb side). Bottom edge 1вҖ“1ВҪ INCHES ABOVE inner elbow bend. Snug but one finger fits under.
8. вӯҗ Find BRACHIAL PULSE: 2вҖ“3 fingertips on inner elbow crease (thumb side). Feel regular tapping.
9. Stethoscope earpieces IN (angled forward toward nose). DIAPHRAGM over brachial pulse.
10. Close valve (clockwise). Pump bulb to 160вҖ“180 mmHg (or up to 200 if you hear immediate beats when deflating).
11. Open valve very slightly вҖ” needle falls SLOWLY, 2вҖ“3 mmHg/sec.
12. вӯҗ Listen: first DISTINCT TAPPING SOUND out of silence = SYSTOLIC pressure. Memorize number.
13. Continue listening. Tapping softens then DISAPPEARS = DIASTOLIC pressure. Memorize number.
14. вӯҗ Open valve fully вҖ” needle to ZERO. Remove cuff.
15. Call light. Wipe stethoscope. Wash hands. Store equipment.
16. вӯҗ Record as FRACTION: SYSTOLIC/DIASTOLIC (e.g., 122/78). Note arm used (RA or LA). Within 4 BPM.
17. Report changes to nurse.

front:
SKILL 31 вҖ” DRESSING A RESIDENT
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Resident's chosen clothing, nonskid shoes
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Let RESIDENT CHOOSE what to wear
вӯҗ TOP: neck opening first, then WEAKER ARM in sleeve, then stronger вҖ” smooth back of shirt last
вӯҗ PANTS: WEAKER LEG through opening first; SOCKS: toe opening first, unroll up вҖ” heel pocket OVER heel
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. вӯҗ Ask resident what they want to wear вҖ” let THEM choose.
4. Lock wheels. Raise side rails. Adjust bed. Raise head вҖ” resident sitting UP.
5. вӯҗ Bath blanket over resident. Pull top linens to foot. Remove clothing from STRONGER SIDE FIRST, then weaker side.
6. вӯҗ PULLOVER TOP: scrunch top, guide NECK OPENING over head first. Reach into WEAK SIDE sleeve, grasp weak hand, pull through. Then strong arm. Lean forward вҖ” smooth back down.
   FRONT-FASTENING TOP: WEAK arm first into sleeve. Bring shirt around back. STRONG arm in. Fasten front.
7. вӯҗ PANTS: WEAK LEG through opening FIRST. Then strong leg. Slide up as far as possible. Resident pushes hips UP вҖ” pull pants over buttocks and up to waist (or roll side to side). Fasten.
8. вӯҗ SOCKS (start with WEAK FOOT): roll sock inside-out down to toe. Stretch toe opening. Resident's toes in. Unroll up foot and over heel вҖ” HEEL POCKET exactly over heel. No twists or ridges.
9. SHOES (WEAK foot first): open fully, guide toe in, ease heel in. Fasten completely.
10. Check вҖ” right-side-out, flat, buttons/zippers closed, waistband proper. Remove bath blanket.
11. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Remove privacy.
12. Call light. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 32 вҖ” UNDRESSING A RESIDENT
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Bath blanket, clean gown if needed
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Bath blanket on FIRST вҖ” work under it throughout for privacy
вӯҗ FRONT-FASTENING: remove STRONG side first, then weak
вӯҗ PANTS: resident lifts hips вҖ” slide pants down and off; if unable, roll side to side
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Lock wheels. Raise side rails. Adjust bed.
4. вӯҗ Drape BATH BLANKET over resident вҖ” shoulders to feet. Reach under, fan-fold TOP LINENS to foot. Bath blanket = only covering.
5. Reach under blanket to assist. Let resident do as much as possible.
6. Reach under and undo all BUTTONS, ZIPPERS, SNAPS, VELCRO.
7. вӯҗ FRONT-FASTENING TOP: slide off STRONG SIDE first (down strong arm and off). Then bring garment over toward WEAK SIDE and off.
   PULLOVER: raise head of bed slightly. Pull shirt up to chest. STRONG ARM off first. Over back to neck. WEAK ARM off. Pull over HEAD.
8. вӯҗ PANTS: unfasten waistband. RESIDENT LIFTS HIPS by pressing hands/feet into mattress. Slide pants AND undergarment DOWN past hips, down legs, off feet. If CANNOT lift вҖ” ROLL to one side, pull down on that side, roll to other side, pull down, slide off.
9. Help into clean gown if needed. Remove bath blanket, replace with regular blanket.
10. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Remove privacy.
11. Call light. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 33 вҖ” APPLYING ELASTIC SUPPORT STOCKINGS
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Elastic support stockings
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Gather stocking DOWN to heel area (inside-out) before putting on
вӯҗ HEEL POCKET must align exactly over resident's heel
вӯҗ Check completed stocking: ANY wrinkle, fold, or twist = problem (cuts circulation) вҖ” smooth completely
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Lock wheels. Raise side rails. Adjust bed.
4. Resident lies SUPINE flat. Remove socks/shoes. Fold blanket away from ONE LEG ONLY.
5. вӯҗ Gather stocking вҖ” push hands toward toe end, scrunching it inside-out down to HEEL AREA. Like scrunching a tube sock to just the foot section.
6. вӯҗ Stretch toe opening. Slide resident's TOES in, then full foot. HEEL POCKET directly over resident's HEEL.
7. вӯҗ Unroll stocking UP the leg вҖ” smooth as you go. Calf, over knee, up thigh.
8. вӯҗ INSPECT entire stocking вҖ” run hands over it. ANY wrinkle, fold, or twist = circulation problem. Fix completely. Heel pocket over heel? Toe opening positioned per manufacturer?
9. Cover leg. Repeat steps 4вҖ“8 for OTHER LEG.
10. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order.
11. Call light. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 34 вҖ” CHANGING INCONTINENT BRIEFS
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Gloves, clean incontinent brief, bed protector, peri care supplies
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Roll soiled brief INWARD ON ITSELF вҖ” soiled surface folded inside вҖ” before disposing
вӯҗ Complete PERINEAL CARE before applying clean brief
вӯҗ Fasten tabs snug but not tight вҖ” two fingers should fit under waistband
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Lock wheels. Raise side rails. Adjust bed. Gloves on.
4. Fold back sheet/blanket to expose brief. Pull apart side TABS (both sides).
5. Grab FRONT PANEL вҖ” roll DOWNWARD from waistband toward groin then between legs.
6. вӯҗ Before fully removing: cover perineal area with TOWEL. Keep resident covered.
7. Roll resident so BACK IS TOWARD YOU (onto side, away from you).
8. вӯҗ Grab soiled brief вҖ” ROLL INWARD ON ITSELF (soiled surface folds inside). Dispose per policy.
9. While resident on side: complete PERINEAL CARE (Skills 25 or 26).
10. Change gloves + wash hands.
11. Unfold CLEAN BRIEF. Hold by BACK PANEL. Slide back panel under resident's buttocks вҖ” back half positioned behind them.
12. Roll resident BACK onto back вҖ” they lie on back half of brief. Pull FRONT PANEL up between legs over groin. Smooth flat.
13. вӯҗ FASTEN TABS both sides вҖ” snug but not tight (two fingers under waistband).
14. Restore clothing and linens. Remove gloves.
15. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Call light. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 35 вҖ” ASSISTING INDEPENDENT RESIDENT WITH BEDPAN
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Bedpan, bed protector, gloves, toilet paper
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Resident lifts hips on "three" вҖ” slide BED PROTECTOR then BEDPAN into position
вӯҗ Standard pan: wider end under BUTTOCKS; Fracture pan: handle toward FOOT, flat lip under buttocks
вӯҗ Leave room and close door for privacy вҖ” resident calls when done
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Lock wheels. Raise side rails. Bed to WAIST HEIGHT. Lower head of bed FLAT.
4. Gloves on. Bath blanket over resident. Pull top linens down. Remove undergarments under blanket.
5. "Lift hips on three вҖ” push feet and hands into mattress. 1-2-3." Resident rises.
6. вӯҗ Slide BED PROTECTOR under buttocks. Then slide BEDPAN into position:
   вҖў STANDARD: wider end under BUTTOCKS
   вҖў FRACTURE PAN: handle toward FOOT, flat elevated lip under buttocks
7. Discard gloves. Wash hands.
8. вӯҗ RAISE head of bed to comfortable semi-sitting position. Pillows if needed. Leave side rails up. Bed to LOWEST.
9. Bath blanket covering. Toilet paper within reach. Call light in resident's DOMINANT HAND. "I'll step out вҖ” press when done." CLOSE DOOR.
10. When called: return. Wash hands. CLEAN GLOVES.
11. Raise bed. Lower head to FLAT. Keep resident covered.
12. вӯҗ "Lift hips вҖ” 1-2-3." Resident rises. Slide bedpan STRAIGHT OUT keeping LEVEL. Cover immediately.
13. Peri care if needed вҖ” FRONT TO BACK. Change gloves. Help with undergarments. Restore linens.
14. Remove bed protector. Discard supplies. Linens in hamper. Change gloves. Wash hands.
15. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Remove privacy. Call light.
16. Carry covered bedpan to bathroom. Note COLOR, ODOR, CONSISTENCY. Empty slowly along toilet bowl edge.
17. Turn on faucet with paper towel. Rinse bedpan with COLD WATER. Empty. Flush. Store.
18. Remove gloves. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 36 вҖ” ASSISTING DEPENDENT RESIDENT WITH BEDPAN
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Bedpan, bed protector, gloves, toilet paper
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Roll resident TOWARD you, position bedpan against buttocks, push far edge INTO mattress вҖ” roll resident BACK onto bedpan
вӯҗ Removing: hold bedpan FLAT, roll resident BACK ONTO SIDE toward you вҖ” they roll OFF bedpan
вӯҗ Note COLOR, ODOR, CONSISTENCY before emptying
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Lock wheels. Raise side rails. Bed to WAIST HEIGHT. Lower head FLAT.
4. Gloves on. Bath blanket over resident. Pull top linens down. Remove undergarments under blanket.
5. вӯҗ Roll resident TOWARD YOU вҖ” onto side, facing you. Back exposed. Bed protector if needed.
6. вӯҗ Position bedpan AGAINST their BUTTOCKS. Push FAR EDGE OF BEDPAN DOWN INTO MATTRESS. Roll resident BACK onto back вҖ” they roll ONTO bedpan, now directly under buttocks.
7. Discard gloves. Wash hands.
8. Raise head to semi-sitting. Pillows if needed. Side rails up. Bed to LOWEST. Bath blanket covering. Toilet paper + call light within reach. CLOSE DOOR.
9. When signaled: return. Wash hands. CLEAN GLOVES. Raise bed. Lower head FLAT.
10. вӯҗ CANNOT raise hips: hold BEDPAN FLAT with one hand. Roll resident TOWARD YOU вҖ” they roll OFF bedpan. Slide bedpan out. COVER immediately.
11. Peri care вҖ” FRONT TO BACK. Change gloves. Help with undergarments. Restore linens.
12. Remove bed protector. Discard supplies. Linens in hamper. Change gloves. Wash hands.
13. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Remove privacy. Call light.
14. Carry covered bedpan to bathroom. Note COLOR, ODOR, CONSISTENCY. Empty slowly, no splashing.
15. Faucet with paper towel. Rinse with COLD WATER. Empty. Flush. Store.
16. Remove gloves. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 37 вҖ” ASSISTING MALE RESIDENT WITH URINAL
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Urinal, bed protector, gloves
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ If unable to self-position: guide PENIS INTO urinal opening while gloved вҖ” replace covers over urinal
вӯҗ Raise head of bed slightly for urination вҖ” then lower to LOWEST
вӯҗ Note COLOR, ODOR, QUALITY before emptying; rinse with COLD WATER
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Lock wheels. Raise side rails. Adjust bed. Gloves on.
4. Slide BED PROTECTOR under resident's buttocks and hips.
5. вӯҗ Hold urinal by handle. If resident CAN self-help вҖ” hand it to him. If CANNOT: gloved, reach under bath blanket, position urinal BETWEEN legs, guide PENIS into urinal opening. Replace covers.
6. Remove gloves. Wash hands.
7. вӯҗ RAISE HEAD OF BED slightly вҖ” helps with urination. Then bed to LOWEST. Disposable wipes within reach.
8. Call light in resident's hand. "Signal when done." CLOSE DOOR.
9. When signaled: return. Wash hands. CLEAN GLOVES. Take covered urinal or have resident hand it to you. Cover it.
10. Discard wipes. Remove bed protector.
11. вӯҗ Take covered urinal to bathroom. Note COLOR, ODOR, QUALITY (clear vs cloudy, sediment). Pour carefully into toilet along inner bowl edge.
12. Faucet with paper towel. Rinse urinal with COLD WATER. Swirl, empty, flush. Store per policy.
13. Remove gloves. Wash hands.
14. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Remove privacy. Call light. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 38 вҖ” ASSISTING DEPENDENT RESIDENT WITH DINING
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Meal tray, clothing protector, hand wipes, chair
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Confirm resident's name + tray matches diet card BEFORE serving
вӯҗ Bite-sized pieces; tell resident WHAT each bite is; WAIT for full chew and swallow before next bite
вӯҗ Keep resident sitting UPRIGHT for AT LEAST 30 MINUTES after eating вҖ” prevents aspiration
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. вӯҗ Check DIET CARD. Ask resident to SAY THEIR NAME (or check wristband/photo). Confirm tray matches diet card вҖ” right tray for right resident.
4. Raise head of bed to FULL 90 DEGREES (like sitting in a chair, spine vertical).
5. Lock wheels. Adjust bed height so your EYES = resident's EYES when you sit beside them.
6. Swing overbed table across. Set tray in resident's visual field.
7. If can't self-clean hands: wipe both hands for them.
8. Clothing protector across chest if desired вҖ” tuck into collar.
9. Pull chair to BEDSIDE. Sit at EYE LEVEL. Sit on STRONG SIDE.
10. Point to each item. Let resident CHOOSE order.
11. вӯҗ Check food temperature (back of hand to container). Cut into BITE-SIZED PIECES (pea-sized for swallowing difficulty). For each bite: TELL them what it is, wait for mouth to open, guide utensil in, WAIT for full CHEW and SWALLOW before next bite. Watch throat вҖ” look for swallow. STOP if coughing, gagging, or food returning вҖ” ALERT NURSE.
12. Offer beverage THROUGHOUT (not just end). Touch rim to LOWER LIP first. Small sips. Slow pour.
13. Talk to resident. Watch their face, not just the food. Wipe mouth/chin during meal.
14. After meal: wipe mouth, chin, hands. Remove clothing protector.
15. вӯҗ CHECK TRAY before removing вҖ” dentures? Eyeglasses? Personal items? Remove those first.
16. вӯҗ UPRIGHT for AT LEAST 30 MINUTES after eating. Do NOT lower head of bed immediately.
17. After 30 min: bed to LOWEST. Remove privacy. Tray to collection area.
18. Call light. Wash hands. Report swallowing difficulties. Document.

front:
SKILL 39 вҖ” MEASURING FLUID INTAKE
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: I&O form, pen
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Record EVERY fluid taken by mouth throughout shift вҖ” including liquid-at-room-temp foods (Jell-O, ice cream)
вӯҗ Convert all to MILLILITERS (1 oz вүҲ 30 mL)
вӯҗ Total must be accurate within 15 mL
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. вӯҗ Throughout shift вҖ” record EVERY fluid taken by mouth: water, juice, milk, broth, coffee, tea, soda, AND liquid-at-room-temp foods (ice cream, Jell-O). Note TIME + WHAT + AMOUNT each occurrence.
4. вӯҗ End of shift: convert all amounts to MILLILITERS (1 oz вүҲ 30 mL).
5. вӯҗ ADD UP all individual amounts for entire shift. Must be accurate within 15 mL.
6. Call light. Wash hands.
7. Record total FLUID INTAKE in INPUT column of I&O sheet.
8. Report to nurse.

front:
SKILL 40 вҖ” MAKING AN UNOCCUPIED BED
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Fitted or flat bottom sheet, top sheet, draw sheet, blanket, pillowcases, gloves, bed protector if needed
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Roll soiled sheet with SOILED SIDE INWARD вҖ” never touch scrubs with it
вӯҗ Bottom sheet pulled TAUT with no wrinkles; hospital corners at foot
вӯҗ Pillowcase: inside-out over your arm, grab pillow end, pull case over pillow
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Wash hands. Gather ALL clean linens вҖ” carry to bedside. Set on CLEAN surface (chair/overbed table, NOT floor).
2. Lock ALL 4 bed wheels. FLATTEN bed. Raise to comfortable WORKING HEIGHT. Gloves on.
3. вӯҗ Loosen all corners of soiled sheet. ROLL soiled sheet toward center вҖ” SOILED SIDE INWARD (burrito roll, head to foot). Hold AWAY from body. Carry to HAMPER. Pillowcases: peel inside-out, drop in hamper.
4. вӯҗ Remove gloves. WASH HANDS.
5. Open CLEAN BOTTOM SHEET. If fitted: stretch corners over mattress starting with head corner nearest you. If flat: center it, tuck using HOSPITAL CORNERS (45В° fold then tuck remainder). Sheet pulled TAUT вҖ” no wrinkles. Draw sheet across middle third, tuck both sides.
6. TOP SHEET over entire bed вҖ” center so equal hang each side. TUCK under foot mattress. HOSPITAL CORNERS at both bottom corners. BLANKET over top sheet. Fold TOP SHEET over blanket 6 inches (neat cuff). FAN-FOLD both down toward foot for easy entry.
7. вӯҗ PILLOWCASE: grasp closed end, flip INSIDE OUT over your hand/arm. Grab one NARROW END of pillow with covered hand. Pull case DOWN over pillow вҖ” flips right-side-out. OPEN END FACES AWAY FROM DOOR.
8. Lower bed to LOWEST position.
9. Carry soiled linen hamper to laundry area. Wash hands. Document.

front:
SKILL 41 вҖ” MAKING AN OCCUPIED BED
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Clean linens, bath blanket, gloves, pillowcases
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Roll soiled sheet TOWARD resident's body (snug against back) вҖ” clean sheet behind it on your side
вӯҗ Resident rolls OVER the divide onto clean side вҖ” soiled sheets now on far side
вӯҗ NEVER shake soiled linen; NEVER put on floor or furniture
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Stack clean linens on clean surface. Lock wheels. Raise side rails. Bed to working HEIGHT. Lower head FLAT. Gloves on.
4. Pull TOP SHEET loose at foot on your working side.
5. Open BATH BLANKET вҖ” DRAPE OVER resident (additional layer). Resident holds it. Reach under вҖ” pull TOP SHEET AND BLANKET together, pull OUT and DOWN to foot. Bath blanket = only covering.
6. Help resident ROLL toward RAISED FAR SIDE RAIL вҖ” back toward you, close to far edge.
7. On working side: loosen BOTTOM SHEET and bed protector from under mattress.
8. вӯҗ Roll soiled bottom sheet/protector TOWARD RESIDENT вҖ” push snug against back like a log against a wall.
9. Open CLEAN BOTTOM SHEET вҖ” fold-line along length. Tuck head end under mattress. Smooth toward resident. Roll excess and PUSH UNDER soiled linen вҖ” creating clean/soiled divide. Smooth flat on your side. Tuck foot end. Hospital corners. Draw sheet + bed protector same way.
10. вӯҗ Raise your NEAR SIDE RAIL. Walk to OTHER SIDE. Lower far side rail. Help resident ROLL BACK over the divide toward you вҖ” they're now on the clean half. Soiled linen bundle is on far half.
11. вӯҗ Grab soiled bundle вҖ” UNROLL it, SOILED SIDE INWARD throughout. Check for belongings. HAMPER вҖ” no shaking, no floor, no furniture.
12. Change gloves + wash hands.
13. вӯҗ Pull clean sheet through вҖ” straight and tight. Tuck head end. Smooth flat, no wrinkles. Tuck foot end. Hospital corners. Pull draw sheet and protector through, smooth, tuck.
14. Help resident roll to CENTER of bed. Pillow under head. Raise NEAR SIDE RAIL.
15. Open TOP SHEET over resident. Resident holds it. Reach under, slide BATH BLANKET out toward foot вҖ” HAMPER.
16. BLANKET over top sheet. Tuck both at foot. Hospital corners. LOOSEN over feet. Fold top sheet OVER blanket 6 inches at top.
17. Remove PILLOWS. Peel pillowcases inside-out. Hamper.
18. вӯҗ Remove gloves. WASH HANDS. Fresh pillowcase per instructions (inside-out over arm, grab narrow pillow end, pull over). Open end AWAY FROM DOOR.
19. Check comfort. Adjust position if needed.
20. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Remove privacy.
21. Call light. Carry hamper. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 42 вҖ” MEASURING & RECORDING ORAL TEMPERATURE (DIGITAL)
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Digital thermometer, disposable probe sheath, gloves
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Seat sheath on probe until it clicks; press power вҖ” wait for READY signal
вӯҗ Place probe in SUBLINGUAL POCKET (under tongue, one side of frenulum) вҖ” lips closed, NOT teeth
вӯҗ Read display IMMEDIATELY when it beeps; document method as "Oral" or "O"
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy. Gloves on.
3. вӯҗ Pull out DISPOSABLE SHEATH. Slide PROBE END into sheath вҖ” feel/hear click as it seats. Press POWER BUTTON. Wait for READY signal (beep + symbol on display).
4. Ask resident to OPEN MOUTH. Locate SUBLINGUAL POCKET (under tongue, one side of frenulum вҖ” the cord under tongue).
5. вӯҗ Insert probe gently into sublingual pocket. Ask resident to CLOSE LIPS around it (NOT teeth).
6. Hold still. Watch screen. Listen for BEEP or watch for light blink вҖ” reading done.
7. вӯҗ Slide thermometer OUT. READ DISPLAY IMMEDIATELY вҖ” memorize temperature before anything else.
8. Use TISSUE to grasp sheath вҖ” peel OFF and WRAP in tissue. Drop in trash. Return thermometer to protective case.
9. Remove gloves. Wash hands.
10. Write TEMPERATURE, DATE, TIME, METHOD вҖ” write "Oral" or "O." on documentation form.
11. Call light. Report changes.

front:
SKILL 43 вҖ” COUNTING AND RECORDING RADIAL PULSE
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Watch with second hand
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Use INDEX + MIDDLE fingers on THUMB SIDE of inner wrist вҖ” NEVER use your thumb
вӯҗ Count for ONE FULL MINUTE вҖ” must be accurate within 4 BPM
вӯҗ REPORT IMMEDIATELY if pulse is BELOW 60 or ABOVE 100 BPM
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. вӯҗ Resident's arm resting at side or across lap вҖ” PALM FACING UP.
4. вӯҗ Place INDEX FINGER + MIDDLE FINGER together on THUMB SIDE of inner wrist (just below base of thumb). Press gently вҖ” feel rhythmic tapping = radial artery. DO NOT use THUMB (it has its own pulse).
5. вӯҗ Glance at watch вҖ” note second hand. Count each beat for ONE FULL MINUTE without stopping. Note final count. Must be within 4 BPM.
6. Also note: RHYTHM (regular or skips?) and STRENGTH (strong/full or weak/thready?).
7. Call light. Wash hands.
8. Write PULSE RATE, DATE, TIME, METHOD вҖ” write "Radial" or "R."
9. вӯҗ REPORT IMMEDIATELY if pulse is BELOW 60 or ABOVE 100 BPM.

front:
SKILL 44 вҖ” COUNTING AND RECORDING RESPIRATIONS
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Watch with second hand
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ DO NOT TELL resident you're counting breathing вҖ” they'll change their rate
вӯҗ After pulse count, keep fingers on wrist but watch chest rise/fall вҖ” each rise+fall = 1 breath
вӯҗ Must be accurate within 2 breaths; REPORT IMMEDIATELY if irregular
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Comfortable position for resident.
4. вӯҗ DO NOT tell resident you're counting breathing вҖ” people immediately change their rate when aware.
5. вӯҗ After finishing RADIAL PULSE COUNT вҖ” KEEP FINGERS ON WRIST (looks like still counting pulse). Actually now watching CHEST AND ABDOMEN. Each RISE + FALL = ONE BREATH.
6. вӯҗ Glance at watch. Count every rise-and-fall for ONE FULL MINUTE. Must be within 2 breaths.
7. Also note: REGULAR or IRREGULAR? SHALLOW or DEEP? Any NOISE (wheezing, gurgling, rattling)? LABORED?
8. вӯҗ Call light. Wash hands.
9. Write RESPIRATORY RATE. Also note pattern and character (regular, shallow, wheezing, etc.).
10. вӯҗ REPORT IMMEDIATELY if breathing is IRREGULAR or if you hear wheezing.

front:
SKILL 45 вҖ” GIVING A BACKRUB
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Lotion, basin of warm water, towels, bath blanket
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Warm lotion BOTTLE in basin of warm water for 5 minutes before starting
вӯҗ Continuous OVAL/FIGURE-8 strokes from BUTTOCKS up SPINE sides to SHOULDERS and back вҖ” hands never leave skin вҖ” 3-5 minutes
вӯҗ Circular fingertip pressure over bony prominences; if skin is WHITE, RED, or PURPLE вҖ” do NOT massage, notify nurse
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. вӯҗ LOTION BOTTLE in BASIN OF WARM WATER вҖ” soak 5 MINUTES. Cold lotion causes muscle tension.
4. Lock wheels. Raise side rails. Bed to working HEIGHT. Lower head FLAT.
5. Help resident onto SIDE or STOMACH. Bath blanket/towel over them. Fold linens DOWN to TOP OF BUTTOCKS вҖ” entire back exposed neck to tailbone.
6. вӯҗ Pour lotion into YOUR PALMS (silver-dollar sized). Rub palms together until warm.
7. вӯҗ LONG STROKES: both palms flat, one each side of UPPER BUTTOCKS. Fingers toward head. Push UPWARD вҖ” simultaneously up EACH SIDE OF SPINE to SHOULDERS. At shoulders: CIRCLE OUTWARD. Move DOWN outer edges/flanks. At BUTTOCKS: CIRCLE. Move back UP. CONTINUOUS вҖ” hands never leave skin. Repeat 3-5 MINUTES (oval/racetrack pattern).
8. вӯҗ KNEADING: loose claw (first 2 fingers + thumb). Walk up each side of spine from tailbone to shoulders вҖ” gentle downward pressure. Circle at shoulders and buttocks.
9. вӯҗ BONY AREAS (spine, shoulder blades, hip bones): fingertips, small CIRCULAR MOTIONS with light pressure. LOOK at each area вҖ” WHITE, RED, or PURPLE skin = DO NOT MASSAGE вҖ” notify nurse after.
10. "Almost done" вҖ” several more long smooth upward strokes to conclude.
11. Blot extra lotion dry with towel (pat, don't rub).
12. Remove blanket/towel. Help dress. Comfortable position.
13. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Remove privacy. Call light.
14. Return lotion to storage. Wash hands. Report skin findings. Document.

front:
SKILL 46 вҖ” PROVIDING ORAL CARE
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Gloves, toothbrush, toothpaste, water cup, emesis basin, clothing protector, lip moisturizer
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Head of bed fully UPRIGHT вҖ” 90 degrees (full sitting position) before starting
вӯҗ Brush order: inner uppers вҶ’ outer uppers вҶ’ chewing uppers вҶ’ inner lowers вҶ’ outer lowers вҶ’ chewing lowers вҶ’ TONGUE (back to tip)
вӯҗ Report: abnormal odor, lip cracking, sores, bleeding gums, tongue/mouth discoloration
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. вӯҗ Lock wheels. Raise side rails. Adjust bed. Raise HEAD COMPLETELY вҖ” resident at FULL UPRIGHT 90-DEGREE SITTING POSITION (spine vertical). Gloves on.
4. Drape CLOTHING PROTECTOR/TOWEL across chest вҖ” like a bib, tuck into collar.
5. WET toothbrush bristles under running water. Shake off excess. PEA-SIZED toothpaste.
6. вӯҗ Tell resident to OPEN MOUTH. Brush in order:
   вҖў INNER UPPER (tongue-side of upper teeth, along gumline вҖ” short back-and-forth)
   вҖў OUTER UPPER (lip-side, along gumline)
   вҖў CHEWING UPPER (flat tops, back-and-forth)
   вҖў INNER LOWER
   вҖў OUTER LOWER
   вҖў CHEWING LOWER
   вҖў TONGUE: toothbrush flat, BACK OF TONGUE to TIP вҖ” 2-3 strokes
7. Pour water into cup. Hold to lips: "Take a sip and rinse." Hold EMESIS BASIN curved side under chin. Spit. WIPE mouth with washcloth. Remove clothing protector.
8. Lip MOISTURIZER on gloved fingertip вҖ” sweep across upper then lower lip.
9. Soiled items in proper containers. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Remove privacy.
10. Call light. Rinse toothbrush (bristles on gloved palm under water). Stand in holder BRISTLES UP. Empty/rinse/dry emesis basin. Return supplies.
11. Remove gloves. Wash hands.
12. вӯҗ Report to nurse: mouth ODOR, lip CRACKING at corners, SORES in mouth, BLEEDING gums, DISCOLORATION.
13. Document.

front:
SKILL 47 вҖ” PROVIDING ORAL CARE (UNRESPONSIVE RESIDENT)
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Gloves, sponge swabs, cleaning solution, water, towel, emesis basin, lip moisturizer, tongue depressor
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Turn HEAD TOWARD YOU вҖ” gravity prevents fluid pooling in throat; EMESIS BASIN at cheek
вӯҗ Sponge swab must be SQUEEZED NEARLY DRY before use вҖ” DAMP not wet (prevents aspiration)
вӯҗ SPEAK TO RESIDENT throughout вҖ” hearing may still be functioning
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter.
2. вӯҗ Identify yourself and resident BY NAME вҖ” then SAY IT OUT LOUD to them. "Hi [name], I'm [your name]. I'm going to clean your mouth now." SPEAK throughout the entire procedure (hearing may still function).
3. Wash hands. Explain procedure out loud. Privacy.
4. Lock wheels. Raise side rails. Adjust bed. Gloves on.
5. вӯҗ TURN RESIDENT'S HEAD TOWARD YOU (rotate on pillow, facing your direction). Gravity keeps fluids from pooling in throat. Place FOLDED TOWEL under CHEEK AND CHIN. Place EMESIS BASIN on towel next to cheek вҖ” catchment for drainage.
6. TONGUE DEPRESSOR: gently insert flat end between upper and lower teeth on one side. Use to hold mouth open throughout.
7. вӯҗ SPONGE SWAB: dip in CLEANING SOLUTION. SQUEEZE FIRMLY between fingers over container вҖ” remove as much excess as possible. Swab must be DAMP, NOT WET. Too much liquid = aspiration risk.
8. вӯҗ With squeezed damp swab: WIPE TEETH вҶ’ GUMS вҶ’ TONGUE вҶ’ INNER CHEEKS. Change swab FREQUENTLY (every 1-2 surfaces). Continue until all areas visibly clean.
9. вӯҗ FRESH CLEAN SWAB: dip in PLAIN WATER. SQUEEZE FIRMLY again. Rinse same areas вҖ” TEETH вҶ’ GUMS вҶ’ TONGUE вҶ’ INNER CHEEKS.
10. Remove towel from cheek. Remove basin. Pat lips/face DRY if wet.
11. LIP MOISTURIZER on gloved fingertip вҖ” sweep upper then lower lip.
12. Soiled items in proper containers. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Remove privacy. Call light.
13. Empty/rinse/dry emesis basin. Return to storage. Remove gloves. Wash hands.
14. вӯҗ Report: ODOR, CRACKING, SORES, BLEEDING, DISCOLORATION. Document.

front:
SKILL 48 вҖ” CLEANING AND STORING DENTURES
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Gloves, denture brush, denture cleanser or toothpaste, denture cup with lid, labeled storage, towel
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ TOWEL in bottom of SINK + partially fill with water вҖ” cushions dentures if dropped
вӯҗ COOL/MODERATE water only вҖ” hot water WARPS and DISTORTS the plastic
вӯҗ Clean THE GROOVE (curved trough touching gum) вҖ” must be thoroughly scrubbed
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Wash hands. Gloves on.
2. вӯҗ Go to sink. Lay FOLDED TOWEL flat in BOTTOM OF SINK. PARTIALLY FILL sink with a few inches of water. Towel + water = cushion if dentures drop.
3. вӯҗ Ask resident for dentures (or remove if unable). Hold over water-filled sink. Run MODERATE/COOL water вҖ” NOT hot. RINSE all surfaces before cleaning.
4. Apply DENTURE CLEANSER or toothpaste to DENTURE BRUSH (softer than regular).
5. вӯҗ Hold denture in one hand over sink. Brush all surfaces:
   вҖў OUTER SURFACES (toward cheeks/lips) вҖ” short circular strokes
   вҖў INNER SURFACES (toward tongue)
   вҖў CHEWING SURFACES (flat biting tops)
   вҖў THE GROOVE (curved trough on UNDERSIDE that contacts GUM) вҖ” must be thoroughly cleaned
6. RINSE entire denture under MODERATE/COOL running water вҖ” rotate under stream, all surfaces. No hot water.
7. RINSE inside of DENTURE CUP AND LID under clean water. Dry with paper towel.
8. вӯҗ Fill denture cup with cleaning SOLUTION or MODERATE/COOL WATER вҖ” enough to COMPLETELY SUBMERGE both pieces. Place upper + lower dentures FULLY COVERED. LID on and pressed closed. Confirm label = RESIDENT'S NAME. Return to correct storage location.
   If resident wants to WEAR dentures вҖ” rinse and hand back. Do not store.
9. Rinse denture brush. Dry. Return equipment. DRAIN sink. TOWEL to laundry hamper.
10. Remove gloves. Wash hands.
11. Document. вӯҗ Report CHIPS, CRACKS, DISCOLORATION, or changes in denture appearance to nurse.

front:
SKILL 49 вҖ” SHAVING A RESIDENT (ELECTRIC RAZOR)
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Electric razor, shaving brush, towel, aftershave (if desired), gloves, mirror
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ CHECK before starting: water nearby? Oxygen in use? Pacemaker? If ANY YES вҖ” do NOT use electric razor
вӯҗ Pull skin TAUT with non-dominant hand before each stroke
вӯҗ Clean razor head after: open/remove head, brush out whiskers, RECAP until clicks
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Lock wheels. Raise side rails. Adjust bed. Raise head вҖ” resident sitting upright.
4. Drape TOWEL across chest horizontally вҖ” catches whiskers and debris.
5. Gloves on.
6. Use small brush to SWEEP whiskers from razor head. Tap head on gloved palm.
7. вӯҗ BEFORE turning on: CHECK вҖ” water nearby? OXYGEN (mask or cannula)? PACEMAKER in care plan? If ANY YES вҖ” do NOT use electric razor (spark/shock risk). Use alternative method.
8. вӯҗ Press POWER BUTTON вҖ” razor hums. Pull skin TAUT with NON-DOMINANT HAND вҖ” stretch flat where about to shave.
9. вӯҗ FOIL SHAVER: BACK-AND-FORTH strokes in DIRECTION of beard growth.
   THREE-HEAD SHAVER: SLOW, WIDE CIRCULAR MOTIONS.
   For both: CHIN (flat against), UNDERSIDE OF CHIN (tip razor slightly, ear to ear), cheeks вҶ’ jawline вҶ’ upper lip вҶ’ chin вҶ’ neck.
10. Hold MIRROR so resident can see reflection. Check for missed spots.
11. If desired: pour AFTERSHAVE into cupped palm. Rub palms together. Pat gently onto freshly shaved areas.
12. Remove towel вҖ” shake INTO TRASH (not into room air). Towel to proper container.
13. Run hand over face/neck and bed surface вҖ” remove any loose hairs.
14. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Remove privacy. Call light.
15. вӯҗ Clean razor: open/remove SHAVING HEAD. Shake out debris into trash. Brush inside completely clean. REPLACE/RECAP head (click closed). Return to case.
16. Remove gloves. Wash hands. Report skin nicks, irritation, rashes. Document.
